title: Vivo Technologies 16 LED Touch Vanity Makeup Light – Touch Controlled, Portable Tabletop Cosmetic Mirror with 180° Swivel Rotation and Tray, UK Plug, Black
features: LED MAKEUP MIRROR – This fantastic touch-controlled light-up cosmetic mirror gives you all the power at your fingertips to create the optimum levels of illumination for applying makeup or eyelashes.
180° SWIVEL ROTATION – This cosmetic mirror rotates 180°, allowing you to check your hair & makeup from a variety of different angles.

PORTABLE & LIGHTWEIGHT – This vanity mirror is both lightweight and portable, allowing you to move it between rooms or take it to work, on holiday, or anywhere else you’d like. The mirror comes complete with a handy tray to store your makeup when in use.

HD QUALITY MIRROR – This makeup mirror measures 27cm x 17cm (Approx.) and utilises 16 bright white LED lightbulbs that provide the crisp & clear viewing surface. The mirror requires 4 x AA batteries for illumination (not included).
Material - ABS LED - 16 LED Rotation: - 180 Degree Lumens - 150 Lumens 1 x magnification 2 colours to choose from - black or white
description: Product Description 16 LED Touch Vanity Makeup Mirror Touch Controlled Mirror Portable Makeup Mirror Tabletop Cosmetic Light 180°Swivel Rotation Tray UK Black Safety Warning This mirror should be used with caution to avoid breakage and injury from sharp edges. It is recommended to mount the mirror securely to prevent it from falling. Use only recommended mounting techniques and ensure the mirror is secure before use. For children's use, the mirror should be mounted out of reach.
